definition: The twenty-fifth letter of the English alphabet, called wy or wye and written in the Latin script.
Nonstandard spelling of you.
A slick and light ship for making pleasure trips or racing on water, having sails but often motor-powered. At times used as a residence offshore on a dock.
A small, usually uncultivated area adjoining or (now especially) within the precincts of a house or other building.
A twisted strand of fibre used for knitting or weaving.
To open the mouth widely and take a long, rather deep breath, often because one is tired or bored, and sometimes accompanied by pandiculation.
You (the people being addressed).
Yes.
A period of time akin to the time taken for the Earth to undergo a full cycle of seasons.
Happening once every year.
To have a strong desire for something or to do something; to long for or to do something.
A wistful or melancholy longing.
plural of year.
An often humid, yellowish froth produced by fermenting malt worts, and used to brew beer, leaven bread, and also used in certain medicines.
To shout; holler; make a loud sound with the voice, especially to express intense emotions such as anger or excitement.

The color of sunflower petals and lemons; the color obtained by mixing green and red light, or by subtracting blue from white light; the color evoked by light of wavelength around 580 nm; one of the three primary colors in subtractive color systems.
Used to show agreement or acceptance.
The day immediately before today; one day ago.
Thus far; up to the present; up to some unspecified time.
Definition unavailable in this build.
To give as a result or outcome; to produce or render.
present participle and gerund of yield
A greeting similar to hi.

Any of several Hindu or Buddhist disciplines aimed at training the consciousness for a state of perfect spiritual insight and tranquillity; especially a system of exercises practiced to promote control of the body and mind.
A milk-based product stiffened by a bacterium-aided curdling process, and sometimes mixed with fruit or other flavoring.
Senses relating to a frame around the neck.
The yellow, spherical part of an egg that is surrounded by the white albumen, and serves as nutriment for the growing young.
The people spoken, or written to, as an object.
In the early part of growth or life; born not long ago.
comparative form of young: more young
A young person.
Belonging to you; of you; related to you (singular; one owner).
That or those belonging to you; the possessive second-person singular pronoun used without a following noun.
Your own self (singular).
Inflection of you (plural) used as the object of a verb or non-locative preposition in a clause whose subject is the same (the people addressed).
The quality or state of being young.
Young or seeming young.
